title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies:
Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies!
